metadata.description: Neo — a concept-to-spec-to-PR multi-agent coding system. Core crew plus additive per-stack plugins, for GitHub Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: neo-core
plugins.description: Coordinated coding-agent crew (technical-engineer orchestrator + researcher, implementation-planner, code-writer, code-reviewer) plus the feature-agent/task-planner specification crew and lifecycle-logging hooks.
